  "name": "claude-code-desktop",

  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite",

    "build:sidecars": "bun run ./scripts/build-sidecars.ts",
    "build:macos-arm64": "bash ./scripts/build-macos-arm64.sh",
    "build:windows-x64": "powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/build-windows-x64.ps1",
    "preview": "vite preview",
    "tauri": "tauri",
    "test": "vitest",
    "test:ui": "vitest --ui",
    "lint": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@tailwindcss/typography": "^0.5.19",

content.text:
The project has **vitest** tests in the `desktop/` directory. There are ~37 test files covering components, stores, and utilities. 

To run them, I need your approval for the command: `npx vitest run` (from the `desktop` directory).

Can you approve the execution?
